query: build ios app with swift and firebase authentication
notes: Original GT expected firebase-auth/ios-swift-development/developing-ios-apps — none exist in the 921-skill corpus. Replaced with closest real skills.

query: react native expo push notifications setup
notes: react-native-expo and building-native-ui exist. push-notification-setup is missing; react-native-architecture is the closest substitute.

query: summarize long research papers
notes: Original GT skills (research-paper-writer, scientific-writing, academic-research-writer) all missing. Replaced with dataset equivalents.

query: clean csv data and generate statistical report in python
notes: UNANSWERABLE: No skills covering CSV data cleaning or Python statistical reporting exist in the 921-skill corpus. All original GT skills (exploratory-data-analysis, csv-data-summarizer, pandas-data-analysis) are missing. System should return low-confidence results.

query: convert pdf to structured markdown with headings and citations
notes: Original GT: pandoc, markdown-formatter, research-documentation — all missing. baoyu-format-markdown is a strong substitute; baoyu-url-to-markdown handles URL→markdown conversion.

query: generate blog post from bullet points with seo optimization
notes: Original GT: blog-post, seo-content-writer, seo-content-optimizer — all missing. seo-geo covers SEO optimization; content-strategy covers content creation; pre-publish-post-assistant is a blog post prep tool.

query: automate github issue triage using ai agent
notes: github-issue-triage exists and is an exact match. automate-github-issues and github-workflow-automation are missing from the corpus.

query: deploy dockerized fastapi app to aws with ci cd
notes: Original GT: docker-deployment, github-actions, cicd-pipeline-setup — all missing. devops-engineer covers CI/CD pipelines; aws-skills covers AWS deployment.

query: build scalable design system with reusable react components
notes: design-system-patterns and web-component-design exist and are strong matches. design-system-starter is missing; design-systems is the closest substitute.

query: generate figma ui wireframes from product description
notes: wireframe-prototyping and implement-design exist. figma (bare name) missing; figma-implement-design is a strong substitute.

query: write unit tests for typescript react components
notes: New query. vitest is the primary testing framework for React/Vite projects.

query: perform code review to find security issues and bugs
notes: New query. code-review-pro explicitly covers security and performance; code-review is the direct match.

query: set up kubernetes cluster with helm charts for microservices
notes: New query. All three skills are direct matches for Kubernetes + Helm deployment.

query: implement gitops workflow with argocd and flux
notes: New query. gitops-workflow is a direct match; devops-engineer provides supporting context.

query: write email sequence for saas product launch marketing
notes: New query. email-sequence is a direct match. content-repurposer can adapt existing content to email format.

query: repurpose youtube video transcript into blog post and social media content
notes: New query. content-repurposer is explicitly designed for multi-format content transformation.

query: track user analytics events and conversion funnels in web app
notes: New query. analytics-tracking is a direct match. Limited corpus coverage for analytics tools.

query: improve my code
notes: New query — intentionally vague. Any code improvement/review skill is marginally relevant (grade=1), but no perfect match (grade=2) because the intent is underdetermined.

query: help me with my project
notes: New query — intentionally unanswerable. Too vague to meaningfully match any skill. Any result is noise. System should ideally return very low scores.

query: write a business email responding to a client complaint
notes: New query — non-developer use case. email-sequence is related but focused on marketing; no skill specifically covers business email writing. Partial credit only.
